description_long: This object is a round, green cabbage with a dense, layered structure and a slightly irregular, natural shape. The surface is covered in overlapping leaves that display prominent veins and a crinkled, matte texture. The coloration is a muted green with subtle variations and some brownish spots, giving it a realistic, organic appearance. One side of the cabbage features a visible opening where the leaves are parted, revealing a lighter green interior. The overall form is globular, with the base slightly flattened and a small stem remnant visible. The cabbage appears fresh, with no loose or separated outer leaves.
description: A round, green cabbage with tightly layered, veined leaves and a natural, crinkled surface. One side has a visible opening showing the lighter interior.
description_view_0: This view shows the cabbage's opening at the top, revealing the lighter green interior and the layered leaf structure.
description_view_1: The cabbage is seen from a side angle, with the opening partially visible and the veined, crinkled leaves wrapping around the body.
description_view_2: The base of the cabbage is visible, showing a small stem remnant and the tightly packed, overlapping leaves.
description_view_3: The back of the cabbage is shown, highlighting the smooth, continuous surface of the outer leaves with no visible openings.
